instruction: Build a FastAPI application that implements a simple task management API. The API should support creating, reading, updating, and deleting tasks. Each task has: id (uuid), title (string), description (string, optional), status (enum: pending, in_progress, done), created_at (datetime), updated_at (datetime). Include filtering by status and pagination with limit/offset query parameters.

constraints: Use in-memory storage (list/dict), do not require a database
Return proper HTTP status codes (201 for create, 204 for delete, 404 for not found)
Include type hints on all functions
Use Pydantic v2 models with proper field validation
